title: zeltnera nudicaulis
intro: Zeltnera nudicaulis, also known as mountain pink or mountain gilia, is a perennial wildflower native to North America. It belongs to the borage family and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Zeltnera nudicaulis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and flowers can also be dried and used in herbal remedies.
